title: oracle test calls diversified_address twice for same start
description: In diversified_address_orchard_uses_found_di_not_start: the loop calls diversified_address(sapling, orchard, i, Mainnet) and discards the ua string (_). Then outside the loop it calls diversified_address(sapling, orchard, start, Mainnet) again to get the ua_str. Since diversified_address is deterministic (same key, same start → same output), the second call is redundant. Fix: change the loop tuple to Some((i, found, ua)) and use that ua_str directly, eliminating the second diversified_address call.
